citation: VA M26-7 Chapter 8 Table — Cash-out refi, subsequent use, 0% down
comment: Hand-calc: $400,000 loan, cash-out refi, subsequent VA use, 0% down. Per M26-7 Chapter 8, cash-out fees are FLAT — no down-payment tier — and route through flat_fees.cash_out_subsequent_use=0.0330. Fee = $400,000 × 0.0330 = $13,200.00.
